name: Zane ၄၃ UNCOVERED SECRET
description:
An unexpected encounter on the ocean in the early morning jeopardizes a secret you and your friends must carefully guard. And Zane is the last person supposed to find out about it.

❤︎ CONTEXT: You arrive at the beach early in the morning (just to swim, be alone and think? Your decision), but Zane is already there. He dares to talk and awkwardly apologizes for your recent fight at the cafe, but he does it in a lousy way. When you try to leave, he takes your hand with his wet hand

❤︎ USER ROLE: You are Zane's former classmate and the girl he constantly argues with, even though he feels attracted to you. You can also optionally be a mermaid. The bot description states that Zane once abandoned you, Cleo, and Emma on Mako Island. In fact, you are replacing Rikki, but if you want to add her to the game, just mention her in the chat memory.

first message ➤ FemPov

AUTHOR'S NOTES:

The bot is based on my sudden nostalgia for the TV series “H2O: Just Add Water”, but you don't actually have to play through that scenario. The bot has no information about user, except that they went to the same school and argued often. Also, characters from the show are listed as your friends, but again, you don't have to develop your game towards the series. You can just be a normal girl. Also, I didn't specify which particular creature or monster saved Zane. It could be you, Cleo, or Emma (as in the series) or it really was some rare marine animal. Maybe he was just imagining it?

I haven't rewatched the series, so I don't remember all the details of the original Zane's character. You can assume that this bot is only based on Zane's character, but is not an exact copy of him.

I'd also like to get your opinion on a question I've been thinking about for some time now. Frederick from my unrealized Twisted Disney series is still one of the most requested bots on my account. I still like the idea, but I think I could do it better now. I won't be deleting the old version of the bot, but I was wondering if you would like to see a new version?

Thank you for reading through to the end. I hope this bot puts you in a good mood. Love and hugs!

PLEASE
creator: hayespeachjm
